name: 1 Train
description: Local service along the IRT Broadway–Seventh Avenue Line through Manhattan's West Side and the Bronx.

name: 2 Train
description: Express service connecting the Bronx, Manhattan's West Side, and Brooklyn via the IRT Broadway–Seventh Avenue Line.

name: 3 Train
description: Express service along the IRT Broadway–Seventh Avenue Line through Manhattan and Brooklyn.

name: 4 Train
description: Express service on the IRT Lexington Avenue Line, one of the busiest subway routes in the world.

name: 5 Train
description: Express service on the IRT Lexington Avenue Line with branches in the Bronx and Brooklyn.

name: 6 Train
description: Local service on the IRT Pelham Line through the Bronx and IRT Lexington Avenue Line through Manhattan.

name: 7 Train
description: Service on the IRT Flushing Line connecting Flushing, Queens to Hudson Yards, Manhattan.

name: A Train
description: Express service on the IND Eighth Avenue Line, the longest subway line in the system.

name: B Train
description: Rush-hour express service on the IND Sixth Avenue Line and the BMT Brighton Line.

name: C Train
description: Local service on the IND Eighth Avenue Line through Manhattan and Brooklyn.

name: D Train
description: Express service connecting the Bronx, Manhattan, and Brooklyn via the IND Concourse and Sixth Avenue Lines.

name: E Train
description: Local service on the IND Queens Boulevard and Eighth Avenue Lines connecting Jamaica, Queens to Lower Manhattan.

name: F Train
description: Local service on the IND Queens Boulevard and Sixth Avenue Lines, one of the longest routes in the system.

name: G Train
description: The only crosstown line that does not enter Manhattan, connecting Queens and Brooklyn.

name: J Train
description: Local service on the BMT Nassau Street and Jamaica Lines connecting Jamaica, Queens to Lower Manhattan.

name: L Train
description: Local service on the BMT Canarsie Line connecting Canarsie, Brooklyn to Eighth Avenue, Manhattan.

name: M Train
description: Local service connecting Forest Hills, Queens through Manhattan and terminating in Middle Village, Brooklyn.

name: N Train
description: Express service on the BMT Astoria and Broadway Lines connecting Astoria, Queens to Coney Island, Brooklyn.

name: Q Train
description: Express service on the BMT Second Avenue and Brighton Lines through Manhattan and Brooklyn.

name: R Train
description: Local service on the BMT Queens Boulevard and Broadway Lines connecting Forest Hills, Queens to Bay Ridge, Brooklyn.

name: 42nd Street Shuttle
description: Short shuttle service connecting Times Square to Grand Central Terminal along 42nd Street.

name: W Train
description: Local service on the BMT Astoria and Broadway Lines connecting Astoria, Queens to Lower Manhattan.

name: Z Train
description: Rush-hour skip-stop express service on the BMT Jamaica Line, running alongside the J train.
